name: Hot and Sour Soup 2
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm tofu, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/8-inch slices.
2. Stir the chicken slices with 1 tablespoon soy sauce in a bowl.
3. Cook the chicken in oil in a Dutch oven until tender - about 3 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken and add the remaining soy sauce to the pan with the next seven ingredients.
5. Heat to boiling, stirring frequently.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
7. Add the chicken and tofu; bring to a boil over medium heat.
8. Stir cornstarch and 1/3 cup water in a small bowl until smooth.
9. Gradually add this mixture to the simmering soup until slightly thickened and smooth.
10. Beat the eggs in a small bowl and slowly pour into the soup, stirring gently until set.
11. Sprinkle green onion over the soup.
